title: Hunu
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Hunu''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. ''Hunu'' attempted to capture [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] during a transfer operation. The attempt was thwarted and the frigate was destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-05-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire: Official Secrets & Solutions]]''
